code.value:
from typing import Any
import asyncio
import concurrent.futures
import os

import httpx
from langchain_openai import ChatOpenAI
from pydantic.v1 import SecretStr

from lfx.base.models.model import LCModelComponent
from lfx.base.models.openai_constants import OPENAI_CHAT_MODEL_NAMES, OPENAI_REASONING_MODEL_NAMES
from lfx.field_typing import LanguageModel
from lfx.field_typing.range_spec import RangeSpec
from lfx.inputs.inputs import BoolInput, DictInput, DropdownInput, IntInput, SecretStrInput, SliderInput, StrInput
from lfx.log.logger import logger


class CustomOpenAIModelComponent(LCModelComponent):
    display_name = "Custom OpenAI"
    description = "Generates text using OpenAI-compatible endpoints (NVIDIA NIM, vLLM, Ollama, etc.)."
    icon = "OpenAI"
    name = "CustomOpenAIModel"

    inputs = [
        *LCModelComponent.get_base_inputs(),
        SecretStrInput(
            name="api_key",
            display_name="API Key",
            info="The API key for the OpenAI-compatible endpoint.",
            advanced=False,
            value="OPENAI_API_KEY",
            required=True,
        ),
        StrInput(
            name="openai_api_base",
            display_name="API Base URL",
            advanced=False,
            info="The base URL of the API. "
            "Defaults to https://api.openai.com/v1. "
            "You can change this to use other APIs like NVIDIA NIM, vLLM, Ollama, etc.",
        ),
        DropdownInput(
            name="model_name",
            display_name="Model Name",
            advanced=False,
            options=[],
            combobox=True,
            refresh_button=True,
            value="",
            info="Click the refresh button to fetch available models from the API, "
            "or type a model name manually.",
        ),
        SliderInput(
            name="temperature",
            display_name="Temperature",
            value=0.1,
            range_spec=RangeSpec(min=0, max=1, step=0.01),
            show=True,
        ),
        IntInput(
            name="max_tokens",
            display_name="Max Tokens",
            advanced=True,
            info="The maximum number of tokens to generate. Set to 0 for unlimited tokens.",
            range_spec=RangeSpec(min=0, max=128000),
        ),
        DictInput(
            name="model_kwargs",
            display_name="Model Kwargs",
            advanced=True,
            info="Additional keyword arguments to pass to the model.",
        ),
        BoolInput(
            name="json_mode",
            display_name="JSON Mode",
            advanced=True,
            info="If True, it will output JSON regardless of passing a schema.",
        ),
        IntInput(
            name="seed",
            display_name="Seed",
            info="The seed controls the reproducibility of the job.",
            advanced=True,
            value=1,
        ),
        IntInput(
            name="max_retries",
            display_name="Max Retries",
            info="The maximum number of retries to make when generating.",
            advanced=True,
            value=5,
        ),
        IntInput(
            name="timeout",
            display_name="Timeout",
            info="The timeout for requests to the API in seconds.",
            advanced=True,
            value=700,
        ),
    ]

    def _resolve_variable(self, field_config: dict) -> str:
        """Resolve a field value, handling Langflow Global Variables."""
        value = field_config.get("value", "")
        if not value or not field_config.get("load_from_db"):
            return value

        try:
            from langflow.services.deps import get_variable_service, session_scope

            variable_service = get_variable_service()
            user_id = getattr(self, "_user_id", None) or getattr(self, "user_id", None)

            async def _get_var():
                async with session_scope() as session:
                    result = variable_service.get_variable(
                        user_id=user_id, name=value, field="", session=session
                    )
                    if asyncio.iscoroutine(result):
                        result = await result
                    return result

            with concurrent.futures.ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=1) as pool:
                result = pool.submit(asyncio.run, _get_var()).result()

            if result:
                return str(result)
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"[CustomOpenAI] Resolution failed: {type(e).__name__}: {e}")

        # Fallback: OS environment variable
        env_val = os.environ.get(value)
        if env_val:
            return env_val

        return value

    def _fetch_models(self, base_url: str, api_key: str = "") -> list:
        """Fetch available models from the /v1/models endpoint."""
        if not base_url:
            return []

        base_url = base_url.rstrip("/")
        if base_url.endswith("/v1"):
            url = f"{base_url}/models"
        elif base_url.endswith("/v1/models"):
            url = base_url
        else:
            url = f"{base_url}/v1/models"

        try:
            headers = {"Content-Type": "application/json"}
            if api_key:
                headers["Authorization"] = f"Bearer {api_key}"
            response = httpx.get(url, headers=headers, timeout=10, verify=False)
            response.raise_for_status()
            data = response.json()
            return sorted(m["id"] for m in data.get("data", []))
        except Exception:
            return []

    def update_build_config(
        self, build_config: dict, field_value: Any, field_name: str | None = None
    ) -> dict:
        if field_name == "model_name":
            # Fetch models from the endpoint
            base_url = self._resolve_variable(build_config.get("openai_api_base", {}))
            api_key = self._resolve_variable(build_config.get("api_key", {}))
            models = self._fetch_models(base_url, api_key)

            build_config["model_name"]["options"] = models

            if len(models) == 1:
                build_config["model_name"]["value"] = models[0]

            # Handle reasoning model UI toggles
            current_model = build_config["model_name"].get("value", "")
            if current_model in OPENAI_REASONING_MODEL_NAMES:
                build_config["temperature"]["show"] = False
                build_config["seed"]["show"] = False
                if current_model.startswith("o1") and "system_message" in build_config:
                    build_config["system_message"]["show"] = False
            else:
                build_config["temperature"]["show"] = True
                build_config["seed"]["show"] = True
                if "system_message" in build_config:
                    build_config["system_message"]["show"] = True

        return build_config

    def build_model(self) -> LanguageModel:
        logger.debug(f"Executing request with model: {self.model_name}")

        # Handle api_key
        api_key_value = None
        if self.api_key:
            if isinstance(self.api_key, SecretStr):
                api_key_value = self.api_key.get_secret_value()
            else:
                api_key_value = str(self.api_key)

        # Handle model_kwargs
        model_kwargs = self.model_kwargs or {}
        if "api_key" in model_kwargs:
            model_kwargs = dict(model_kwargs)
            del model_kwargs["api_key"]

        parameters = {
            "api_key": api_key_value,
            "model_name": self.model_name,
            "max_tokens": self.max_tokens or None,
            "model_kwargs": model_kwargs,
            "base_url": self.openai_api_base or "https://api.openai.com/v1",
            "max_retries": self.max_retries,
            "timeout": self.timeout,
        }

        if self.model_name not in OPENAI_REASONING_MODEL_NAMES:
            parameters["temperature"] = self.temperature if self.temperature is not None else 0.1
            parameters["seed"] = self.seed

        if isinstance(parameters.get("api_key"), SecretStr):
            parameters["api_key"] = parameters["api_key"].get_secret_value()

        output = ChatOpenAI(**parameters)
        if self.json_mode:
            output = output.bind(response_format={"type": "json_object"})

        return output

    def _get_exception_message(self, e: Exception):
        try:
            from openai import BadRequestError
        except ImportError:
            return None
        if isinstance(e, BadRequestError):
            message = e.body.get("message")
            if message:
                return message
        return None
